reviews.review_description:
I was genuinely blown away by this VR Familiarization App! Whether you're a seasoned pilot, a student, or just an aviation enthusiast, this is a truly engaging way to learn any aircraft. Top reasons for my 5 star rating:

Incredible Detail & Visuals - The level of detail in this application for both content and the visuals is amazing. Never seen a training app with this much attention to detail. 

Seamless and Easy to Navigate - The developers have created a clean, intuitive interface that makes moving through the 3D space effortless and not the usual struggle. 

Surprisingly Entertaining - I expected a dry, technical tool, but I was surprisingly entertained! It doesn't feel like studying, it feels like exploring. 

Highly recommended for anyone serious about aviation training. This is absolutely the future of aircraft familiarization.

developer_response.body: Thanks for this great review. It's very much appreciated!

reviews.review_description: The game is so bad it won’t even let me play. It’s says ramp simulator, but you can’t even hit ramps.
How the hell do you start it

developer_response.body:
Hi ltitebobby -
 
Thanks for taking the time to try the app and to write a review.  I'm sorry things didn't go as planned for you. 

To help, I think we're going to need a little more information. Could you elaborate over email and give us a chance to add some stars onto your review? Please send anything you think might help to info@netedgevr.com.
 
Thanks,
NetEdgeVR Support
